# `docs/templates`

## Description
`This directory contains reusable document templates for the planning repository. Use these files as starting points when creating new standards, references, workflows, README files, routing tables, or other structured repository documents.`

## Files
| Path | Description |
|---|---|
| `docs/templates/README.md` | Describes the purpose of the templates directory and the templates stored here. |
| `docs/templates/agent_template.md` | Template for an AGENTS.md file. |
| `docs/templates/command_reference_template.md` | Template for a repository-native command page. |
| `docs/templates/decision_record_template.md` | Template for a durable decision record under `docs/planning/decisions/`. |
| `docs/templates/documentation_template.md` | Template for a flexible repository documentation document. |
| `docs/templates/feature_design_template.md` | Template for a feature-level technical design document. |
| `docs/templates/implementation_plan_template.md` | Template for an implementation-plan document under `docs/planning/design/implementation/`. |
| `docs/templates/prd_template.md` | Template for a PRD under `docs/planning/prds/`. |
| `docs/templates/readme_template.md` | Template for a directory README.md file. |
| `docs/templates/reference_template.md` | Template for an external reference document. |
| `docs/templates/routing_table_template.md` | Template for a routing table document. |
| `docs/templates/task_template.md` | Template for a local-first task record under `docs/planning/tasks/`. |
| `docs/templates/workflow_template.md` | Template for a workflow document. |
